title: PrtGrowth
description: Control how fast crops grow on your server.
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/LvLfMFn.png)

**PrtGrowth** is a plugin for Minecraft servers, compatible with multiple game versions. It modifies crop growth, allowing crops to instantly reach their maximum stage. This plugin ensures that “vanilla” crops remain a viable and attractive option for less patient players.

This plugin was developed to accelerate plant growth in Minecraft by skipping all intermediate stages and taking them directly to the final stage. It works on crops that have defined growth stages, such as carrots and potatoes, by intercepting the server’s growth event and making the plant immediately reach its maximum size whenever the server triggers a growth action. However, it is not compatible with plants that do not have a growth event, such as sugar cane, cactus, and bamboo. In summary, the plugin does not allow custom growth times; it only speeds up plants with defined stages, bypassing intermediate phases.

<center>

  [![Imagem 1](https://i.imgur.com/j2uISZG.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Pretti_)
  [![Imagem 2](https://i.imgur.com/DbhBAYf.png)](https://builtbybit.com/creators/pretti_.145409/)
  [![Imagem 3](https://i.imgur.com/Tm2q3eB.png)](https://builtbybit.com/resources/prtminetreasures-custom-treasures.59302/)
  
</center>

## **Features:**

* **Multi-Version Compatibility**: Supports Minecraft versions from 1.8 to 1.21.
* **Optimized Performance**: Low resource usage for high-demand servers.
* **Highly Configurable**: Fully customize every functionality of the plugin.

## **Commands:**

```yaml
/growth = Show help commands
/growth reload = Reload the plugin
````

## **Permissions:**

  * **prtg.command** = Permission to run /protect
  * **prtg.command.reload** = Permission to run /protect reload

## **Images:**
![Imagem](https://i.imgur.com/ABIHJky.gif)

## **Config:**

<details>
<summary>Configs</summary>

```yaml
#  _____      _    _____                   _   _
# |  __ \    | |  / ____|                 | | | |
# | |__) | __| |_| |  __ _ __ _____      _| |_| |__
# |  ___/ '__| __| | |_ | '__/ _ \ \ /\ / / __| '_ \
# | |   | |  | |_| |__| | | | (_) \ V  V /| |_| | | |
# |_|   |_|   \__|\_____|_|  \___/ \_/\_/  \__|_| |_|
#                                          by Pretti_

#
# Permissions:
# - prtg.command        = To be able to access the list of commands with the /growth;
# - prtg.command.reload = To be able to reload the plugin with the /growth reload;

#
# PLANTS
#
plants:
  method: BLACKLIST
  values: [] # Remove '[]' and add materials plants
  #- "CARROT"
  #- "POTATO"
```


</details>


## **Messages:**


<details>
<summary>Messages</summary>

```yaml
#
# +--------------------------------------------+
# |                  MESSAGES                  |
# +--------------------------------------------+
#

messages:
  no-permission: "&4&lG &4» &cYou do not have access to this command!"
  reload: "&2&lG &2» &aConfiguration reloaded successfully!"
  reload-error: "&4&lG &4» &cConfiguration was not successfully reloaded! (Check console)"
  help:
  - ""
  - "&6&lGrowth &7- &eHelp commands:"
  - ""
  - "&6* &e/growth reload &f= &7Reloads the configuration;"
  - ""
```

</details>

## **Important Notice:**

PrtGrowth is a multi-version plugin, compatible with Minecraft versions 1.8 to 1.21, designed to provide a unique and exciting experience for servers. However, like any plugin, it may contain bugs.

If you encounter any issues or errors with the plugin, **do not post them in the review channel**. Instead, send a private message directly so I can investigate and resolve the problem as quickly as possible.

Also, please leave a positive review\! They help drive the development of the plugin and bring future updates, ensuring continuous improvements and new features.

Your cooperation is essential to keep the plugin running smoothly and provide the best possible experience for all users\!
